Package de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.replay

Class AbstractProofReplayer

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.replay.AbstractProofReplayer
Direct Known Subclasses:
CopyingProofReplayer, SlicingProofReplayer
public abstract class AbstractProofReplayer extends Object
Abstract proof replayer/constructor. Always works based on a previous/original proof and a "new" proof.

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractProofReplayer

      protected AbstractProofReplayer(Proof originalProof, Proof proof)
      Instantiate a new replayer.
      Parameters:
      originalProof - previous proof
      proof - new proof

  • Method Details

    • reApplyRuleApp

      protected ImmutableList<Goal> reApplyRuleApp(Node node, Goal openGoal) throws IntermediateProofReplayer.BuiltInConstructionException
      Re-apply the provided node of the original proof on the goal in the new proof.
      Parameters:
      node - original proof node to re-apply
      openGoal - open goal to apply the proof node on
      Returns:
      the new goals added by this rule application
      Throws:
      IntermediateProofReplayer.BuiltInConstructionException - on error

    • getInterestingInstantiations

      public Collection<String> getInterestingInstantiations(SVInstantiations inst)
      Get the "interesting" instantiations of the provided object.
      Parameters:
      inst - instantiations
      Returns:
      the "interesting" instantiations (serialized)
